raw_text:
Aisha: Good morning Mike, thanks for reaching out. You were asking about our corporate travel services?

Mike: Yeah, so we're a retail company. About 25 of us. Our CEO and a couple of directors travel maybe once or twice a year. I was thinking maybe airport lounge access or something like that could be useful for them.

Aisha: That's great. Do you have a sense of how many people would need travel management or lounge access?

Mike: Honestly, maybe five or six people at most. The CEO, two directors, and sometimes their PAs.

Aisha: And in terms of budget — have you had any internal conversations about what you're looking to spend?

Mike: Not really. I'm just exploring at this stage. I'd have to speak to the CEO about budget. I don't really handle the finances.

Aisha: Understood. Is there a particular timeline you're working towards?

Mike: No specific timeline. Whenever really. Maybe later this year, maybe next year. We're not in any rush.

Aisha: Has your CEO seen any information about our services, or is this initial exploration purely from your side?

Mike: Just me looking into it. I haven't mentioned it to her yet. I wanted to get some info first.

Aisha: Of course. What would help you take this back to her? A brochure? A pricing overview?

Mike: Yeah a brochure would be great. Maybe just a one-pager with pricing. Nothing too detailed at this stage.

Aisha: I'll send that over today. And if it makes sense after your CEO reviews it, we can set up a more detailed call.

Mike: Yeah sounds good. No promises though — just seeing what's out there.
